snippet.title: Marvel Studios' Black Widow - Official Teaser Trailer
snippet.description:
Marvel Studios' Black Widow is in theaters May 1, 2020.

► Subscribe to Marvel: http://bit.ly/WeO3YJ
► See the poster: https://www.marvel.com/articles/movies/official-black-widow-film-trailer
